tools.name: improve_prompt
tools.description: Rewrite a rough prompt into a sharper, ready-to-use prompt structured as Role, Task, Context, Format (RTCF). Returns the improved prompt plus its four parts. Use this before answering when the user's request is vague, or when the user asks to improve a prompt.

tools.name: build_prompt
tools.description: Compose a ready-to-use prompt from explicit Role, Task, Context, and Format parts. Use when the user already knows the pieces and wants them woven into one clean prompt.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "improve_prompt" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Rewrite a rough prompt into a sharper, ready-to-use prompt structured as Role, Task, Context, Format (RTCF). Returns the improved prompt plus its four parts. Us…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
